title: Illager Universe
description: This Mod makes Illager a main part of the game as well as the Structures and even raids are stronger and more intense. Feel free to try it out!!
body:
Welcome to Illager Universe!
![Illager Universe description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40c08a68ca0bb8a726361c3afc060f56dfd85a40_0.webp)

This Mod requiers Geckolib and it is still not that finished so please report bugs if u found some

![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e14299e2eb04c4f60b8f53bc424eec4c75e49a6b_0.webp)

That was one of the Items but there are much more ingame!
